title: Alvissmal: The Wisdom of the Dwarf
description: Thor keeps a dwarf talking until dawn — when sunlight turns him to stone. A mythological dictionary of poetic language.
introduction: Thor keeps a dwarf talking until dawn — when sunlight turns him to stone. A mythological dictionary of poetic language.

translation.text: Thor said: 'Answer me, Alvis, wisest of dwarves: what is the sun called in each of the worlds?'
